overview: Lord's International School Group is a comprehensive, role-based school management platform with 5 distinct portals: Principal (administrative hub), Teachers (academic engine), Students (learning hub), Driver (safety & logistics), and Main Controller (technical core). All data is stored securely on the ICP blockchain, enabling real-time multi-device access for all stakeholders.
features: 5 independent role-based portals on the landing page
Principal Panel: User Management, Financial Dashboard, Academic Oversight, Notice Broadcaster, Inquiry Management
Teachers Portal: Attendance Marker, Gradebook, Lesson Planner, Assignment Manager, Parent Messaging
Students Portal: Personal Dashboard, Digital Library, Fee Status, Online Submission, Timetable
Driver Portal: Route Management, GPS Tracking, Pickup/Drop Check, Emergency Alert, Maintenance Log
Main Controller: Database Management, RBAC, Automation Engine, System Configuration, Backup & Security
Real-time data sync across all portals via ICP backend
Permanent sessions with password-based login for all roles
